arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham are now on the verge of signing 'outstanding' player after Mathys Tel rejected them
Mathys Tel: Tottenham learn transfer decision of Bayern Munich forward
arts.sum: Tottenham are one of several Premier League teams interested in signing Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Manchester United have now done after Mathys Tel snubs Tottenham offer
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Manchester United have leapt into action following Mathys Tel’s decision to snub Tottenham Hotspur. Manchester United are after new...

arts.ttl: Man Utd Ready to Hijack Another Tottenham Transfer After Mathys Tel
arts.sum: With eyes on Mathys Tel, Manchester United have reportedly got another Spurs target lined up.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel makes Tottenham transfer decision as Man Utd, Arsenal and Chelsea stance emerges
arts.sum: Mathys Tel wants to leave Bayern Munich before transfer deadline day and Tottenham stole a march on multiple Premier League rivals by agreeing a £50million deal with the German giants on Thursday

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Holstein Kiel: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern play them next in the Bundesliga, and Vincent Kompany wants to gather as much traction as possible in the leadup to a gauntlet of tough matches in February. A look at the rosters and injuries for Holstein Kiel and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel spurns Tottenham Hotspur! Manchester United, Chelsea, Aston Villa still in the mix
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalists Florian Plettenberg and Kerry Hau, Bayern Munich attacker Mathys Tel has rejected an offer from Tottenham Hotspur, despite Spurs chairman Daniel Levy flying to Germany to meet with him earlier today: Mathys #Tel has rejected an offer presented by Spurs boss Daniel Levy in Munich today.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich youngster 'rejects' Premier League club following 'face-to-face' talks
arts.sum: Bayern Munich youngster Mathys Tel is reportedly preparing to reject the chance to join Tottenham Hotspur before the conclusion of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel: Bayern Munich star rejects €60m Tottenham transfer - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Tottenham appeared to be leading the race for the 19-year-old after striking a €60 million verbal agreement with Bayern over a permanent transfer, but the final decision was still in the hands of Tel. Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel has rejected Tottenham, according to French media and Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano says Mathys Tel has now informed Tottenham of his decision
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been in pursuit of Mathys Tel as they look to bring some attacking reinforcements on board. TBR Football chief correspondent Graeme Bailey recently confirmed that Tottenham...
